actor_claims.quote_text: New Mountain Partners IV committed to purchase (or cause to be purchased) from Parent equity securities of Parent having an aggregate purchase price in cash of $382.5 million.
Jefferies Finance LLC and KeyBank National Association being collectively referred to as the "Lenders"
Jefferies Finance LLC and KeyBank National Association being collectively referred to as the "Lenders"

Parent has obtained a commitment letter (as amended from time to time in accordance with the merger agreement, the "debt commitment letter") from Jefferies Finance LLC, KeyBank National Association and KeyBanc Capital Markets Inc.
Jefferies Finance LLC and KeyBank National Association being collectively referred to as the "Lenders"

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: On April 7, 2015, New Mountain Partners IV entered into an equity commitment letter (which we refer to as the "equity commitment letters" and, together with the debt commitment letter described below, the "commitment letter") with Parent pursuant to which New Mountain Partners IV committed to purchase (or cause to be purchased) from Parent equity securities of Parent having an aggregate purchase price in cash of $382.5 million.
the Lenders commit to provide, severally but not jointly, upon the terms and subject to the conditions set forth in the debt commitment letter, in the aggregate up to $402.5 million in debt financing
Jefferies Finance LLC and KeyBank National Association being collectively referred to as the "Lenders"

event_claims.description: The consummation of the merger is not subject to a financing condition.
event_claims.quote_text: The consummation of the merger is not subject to a financing condition

event_claims.description: New Mountain Partners IV entered into an equity commitment letter with Parent for $382.5 million of equity financing.
event_claims.quote_text: On April 7, 2015, New Mountain Partners IV entered into an equity commitment letter (which we refer to as the "equity commitment letters" and, together with the debt commitment letter described below, the "commitment letter") with Parent pursuant to which New Mountain Partners IV committed to purchase (or cause to be purchased) from Parent equity securities of Parent having an aggregate purchase price in cash of $382.5 million.

event_claims.description: The Lenders committed to provide up to $402.5 million in debt financing.
event_claims.quote_text: the Lenders commit to provide, severally but not jointly, upon the terms and subject to the conditions set forth in the debt commitment letter, in the aggregate up to $402.5 million in debt financing
